events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.

events.name: dust_storm
events.description: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.

events.name: breakthrough
events.description: New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Rust Vega notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Dax Iron dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

## Year 74

### Events
- [GRN] **phobos_transit**: Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
- [YEL] **dust_storm**: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.
- [GRN] **breakthrough**: New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.

**Activity:** mediate(4), cooperate(3), terraform(2), explore(2), pray(2)
**Resources:** food:100%[OK] | water:100%[OK] | power:100%[OK] | air:100%[OK] | medicine:100%[OK]
**Cohesion:** 90%

### Sub-simulations (8)
- depth-1 luna-tide: 0
- depth-1 zeph-wind: None
- depth-1 pax-stone: 1

*META: Rust Vega notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.*

diaries.text:
**Pax Stone** (earth/judge) — Year 74

Another year. We are still here.

The dust never stops.

*— Pax Stone, judge*

**Fen Marsh** (water/healer) — Year 74

The water in me stirs with possibility.

The dust never stops.

*— Fen Marsh, healer*

**Rust Tid** (fire/pioneer) — Year 74

The fire in me stirs with possibility.

The dust never stops.

*— Rust Tid, pioneer*
